## Overview

DEALWATCH — Track mergers, acquisitions, and regulatory filings.
Monitors news sources, SEC EDGAR, and FCC filings for deal status changes.

Usage:
  dealwatch track "Fox Roku"        Track a deal by name
  dealwatch list                     Show tracked deals
  dealwatch check                    Ch

| `load_state()` | Load or create state. |

| `fetch_google_news(query: str, max_results: int)` | Scrape Google News RSS for deal mentions. |

| `cmd_check(args)` | Check all tracked deals for updates. |
| `cmd_remove(name: str, args)` | Stop tracking a deal. |
